allow: Bash(# Login and capture session cookie, then test zone detail curl -s -c /tmp/cookies.txt -X POST http://localhost:9191/api/v2/auth/login \\ -H ""Content-Type: application/json"" \\ -d ''{""username"":""testadmin"",""password"":""testadmin123"",""auth_method"":""LOCAL""}'' # Test zone list first curl -s -b /tmp/cookies.txt http://localhost:9191/api/v2/zones 2>&1)
